title: Pugmeowla's Herbs of Wakanda
description: Herbs of Wakanda brings the power, technology, and legacy of Black Panther from Heroes Expansion into Minecraft Palladium 1.20.1.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/cV4IDSdG4uk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Craft and consume the legendary Heart-Shaped Herb Potion to unlock the enhanced abilities of the Black Panther. Once imbued with the herb’s power, you can craft the iconic Panther Habit suit and gain supernatural strength, agility, and resilience.

Features

Heart-Shaped Herb Potion
Grants superhuman abilities when consumed:

Increased strength

Higher speed

Enhanced jump / agility

Damage resistance



Black Panther Necklace

Full armor set styled after the Black Panther suit.

Wearing the complete set grants:

Extra protection

Kinetic energy absorption

requires infinity stone core as a dependency
